calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Stay Proceedings If Motion To Compel Arbitration Is Granted
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANTS IT ALL STARTS HERE LLC D/B/A PALMS TO PINES VACATION RENTALS, and CHARLES NEWCOMB's Motion To Stay Proceedings If Motion To Compel Arbitration Is Granted.

Appearances (in court):
June P. Bashant, Esq., of Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn, (415) 398-5398, for Plaintiff.
Karen L. Prodromo, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, (925) 357-3456, for Defendant AIRBNB, Inc.

The matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants It All Starts Here, LLC and Charles Ryan Newcomb's motion to stay proceedings is DENIED AS MOOT.

In light of its decision denying Airbnb's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings, Defendants It All Starts Here, LLC and Charles Ryan Newcomb's motion to stay proceedings, which was contingent on an order granting Airbnb's motion, is denied as moot.

Moving Defendants are ordered to prepare and submit to Dept. 302 a proposed form of order consistent with the tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Court Reporter: Victoria Sanchez; CSR: 13447; T: (559) 308-2237; E: sanchez_victoria@rocketmail.com. (302/JMQ)***Afyer hearing, an order is signed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s, Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Appearances (in court):
June P. Bashant, Esq., of Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn, (415) 398-5398, for Plaintiff.
Karen L. Prodromo, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, (925) 357-3456, for Defendant AIRBNB, Inc.

The subject is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Court Reporter: Victoria Sanchez; CSR: 13447; T: (559) 308-2237; E: sanchez_victoria@rocketmail.com. (302/JMQ)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
